option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# StrayCat вҖ” New Class Layout Diagram
## High-level Architecture (New Names)
``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ UI / PRESENTATION в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ StrayCatApp в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”ҖвҶ’ SimulationScreen (Scaffold) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ RoutePlanningViewModel вҶҗ route setup + messaging в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ PlaybackViewModel вҶҗ playback control в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ SettingsViewModel вҶҗ simulation config в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ SearchViewModel вҶҗ location search в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”ҖвҶ’ SimulationMapContent вҶҗ map surface + overlays в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ TomTomMap вҶҗ map component в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”ҖвҶ’ PlaybackControls вҶҗ play/pause/stop/progress в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ INFRASTRUCTURE / WIRING в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ AppGraph (new, DI container) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ configStore: InMemoryConfigurationStore в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ stateStore: InMemorySimulationStateRepository в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ eventBus: InMemorySimulationEventBus в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ dataStore: InMemoryRouteTrackStore в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ controller: ServiceSimulationController в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ locationPublisher: MockLocationPublisher в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Foreground Service (SimulationService) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ houses: SimulationEngine (was LocationSimulator) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ FlowPlayer (lifecycle: play/pause/resume/stop) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ RealisticDelayCalculator (pacing algorithm) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ PointTransformPipeline (composite transforms) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ BearingTransform в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ NoiseTransform в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ DefaultProgressTracker (emits events) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Mock GPS Injection в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ MockLocationPublisher (writes fake fixes to GPS_PROVIDER) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Real GPS Source в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ SystemLocationProvider (reads real GPS for map) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ DOMAIN MODEL в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Route Planning в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ RoutePlanningViewModel вҶ’ TomTomRoutePlanner в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ produces: List<RoutePoint> (was SimulationPoint) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ location: Location в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ elapsedTravelTime: Duration в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ speed: Double? в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Route Playback Store в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ RouteTrackStore (was SimulationDataRepository) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ holds: List<RoutePoint> вҶҗ the "track" being played в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Playback State Machine в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ SimulationState (Idle | Running | Paused | Stopped | Error) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ SimulationEvent (Started | Paused | Resumed | Stopped | вҖҰ) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ SimulationStateTransitions (fold events вҶ’ state) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Simulation Configuration в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ SimulationConfiguration (immutable) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ useRealisticTiming в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ delayBetweenEmissions / speedMultiplier в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ loopIndefinitely в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ noiseLevelInMeters в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Processes / Transforms в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ PointTransform (interface) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ BearingTransform (calculate heading from travel) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ NoiseTransform (add GPS jitter) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Event Bus (cross-cutting) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ SimulationEventBus (publish lifecycle events) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җ consumed by: state machine, VMs, UI (snackbars) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ```
## Data Flow: From Route Planning to GPS Replay
``` User Action (map long-press or search) вҶ“ RoutePlanningViewModel.setOrigin() / .setDestination() вҶ“ [both set?] вҶ’ trigger RoutePlanningViewModel.planRouteIfReady() вҶ“ TomTomRoutePlanner.planRoute(origin, destination) вҶҗ TomTom SDK вҶ“ Route (TomTom object) вҶ“ RoutePlannerExt.planRoute() вҶҗ convert to domain вҶ“ List<RoutePoint> (location + elapsedTravelTime + speed) вҶ“ RoutePlanningViewModel._points.value = result вҶ“ SimulationScreen вҶ’ Dashboard вҶ’ PlaybackControls вҶ“ User presses Play Button вҶ“ PlaybackViewModel.startPlaying(points) вҶ“ RouteTrackStore.update(simulationPoints) вҶ“ PlaybackCommands.start() вҶҗ signal to SimulationService вҶ“ SimulationService (foreground service) вҶ“ SimulationEngine.start() вҶ“ FlowPlayer.start() вҶҗ fire up the emission pipeline вҶ“ flow { while (isActive) { RouteTrackStore.snapshot() вҶҗ fetch current track вҶ“ (with index) RealisticDelayCalculator.calculateDelay() вҶҗ pace it вҶ“ (apply transforms) PointTransformPipeline.transform() в”ңв”Җ BearingTransform (calc heading) в””в”Җ NoiseTransform (add jitter) вҶ“ (convert to Android Location) MockLocationPublisher.setTestProviderLocation() вҶ“ (emits fake GPS fix) GPS_PROVIDER (faked) вҶ“ TomTomMap (reads real GPS; can also be mocked) Rest of app (can see the fake location) SimulationEventBus.pushEvent(Progress(вҖҰ)) вҶ“ (fed into UI) PlaybackViewModel.progress вҶ’ ProgressBar } } ```
## Package Refactor (Optional, but clearer)
``` // NEW STRUCTURE:
com.lainovic.tomtom.straycat/ в”ңв”Җв”Җ application/ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ StrayCatApp.kt в”ңв”Җв”Җ domain/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ location/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ RoutePoint.kt (was SimulationPoint) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ simulation/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SimulationConfiguration.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SimulationState.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SimulationEvent.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SimulationStateTransitions.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SimulationEventBus.kt (interface) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ PlaybackCommands.kt (was SimulationController) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ RouteTrackStore.kt (was SimulationDataRepository) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ (config/state mgmt interfaces) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ playback/ вҶҗ NEW: playback orchestration в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ PlaybackEngine.kt (was SimulationEngine / LocationSimulator) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ FlowPlayer.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ RealisticDelayCalculator.kt (was SimpleDelayCalculator) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ PointTransformPipeline.kt (was SimpleSimulationPointProcessor) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ BearingTransform.kt (was BearingProcessor) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ NoiseTransform.kt (was NoiseProcessor) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ DefaultProgressTracker.kt в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ logging/ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ Logger.kt в”ңв”Җв”Җ infrastructure/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ location/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SystemLocationProvider.kt (was CustomLocationProvider) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ MockLocationPublisher.kt (was MockLocationProvider) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ GpsConfiguration.kt в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ service/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SimulationService.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ PlaybackCommandsAdapter.kt (was ServiceSimulationController) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ events/ вҶҗ RENAMED from 'analytics' в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ InMemorySimulationEventBus.kt в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ store/ вҶҗ NEW: all persistence в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ InMemoryRouteTrackStore.kt (was InMemorySimulationDataRepository) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ InMemorySimulationStateRepository.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ InMemoryConfigurationStore.kt (was SimpleSimulationConfigurationManager) в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ shared/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ RoutePlannerExt.kt в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ LocationMappers.kt (split from utils) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ PlacesInit.kt (split from init.kt) в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ CompositionRoot.kt вҶҗ NEW в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ object AppGraph { в”Ӯ в”Ӯ val configStore = вҖҰ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ val stateStore = вҖҰ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ val eventBus = вҖҰ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ val trackStore = вҖҰ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ } в”Ӯ в””в”Җ replaces: *Singleton files в”ңв”Җв”Җ ui/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ simulation/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SimulationScreen.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ RoutePlanningViewModel.kt (was DashboardViewModel) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ PlaybackViewModel.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SettingsViewModel.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SearchViewModel.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SimulationMapContent.kt (was Dashboard) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ PlaybackControlsWrapper.kt (was SimulationPlayerControls) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SearchPanel.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ SettingsPanel.kt в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ components/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ PlayButton.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ PlaybackControls.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SearchButton.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ SettingsButton.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ TomTomMap.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ TomTomMapExt.kt в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ theme/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Color.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Sizes.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Type.kt в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ Theme.kt в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ utils/ вҶҗ consolidate UI helpers в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Toast.kt в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ DateFormat.kt в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ (other UI utils) в””в”Җв”Җ shared/ вҶҗ cross-cutting helpers в”ңв”Җв”Җ LocationExt.kt в”ңв”Җв”Җ LocationMappers.kt в””в”Җв”Җ (other converters) ```
## Summary of Name Changes (Quick Reference)
| Old | New | Layer | |---|---|---| | `SimulationPoint` | `RoutePoint` | Domain | | `SimulationDataRepository` | `RouteTrackStore` | Domain | | `SimulationController` | `PlaybackCommands` | Domain | | `LocationSimulator` | `PlaybackEngine` | Domain / Infra | | `SimpleDelayCalculator` | `RealisticDelayCalculator` | Domain | | `SimpleSimulationPointProcessor` | `PointTransformPipeline` | Domain | | `SimulationPointProcessor` | `PointTransform` | Domain | | `BearingProcessor` | `BearingTransform` | Domain | | `NoiseProcessor` | `NoiseTransform` | Domain | | `SimpleProgressTracker` | `DefaultProgressTracker` | Domain | | `HeadingCalculator` | `BearingCalculator` | Domain | | `CustomLocationProvider` | `SystemLocationProvider` | Infra | | `MockLocationProvider` | `MockLocationPublisher` | Infra | | `ServiceSimulationController` | `PlaybackCommandsAdapter` | Infra | | `DashboardViewModel` | `RoutePlanningViewModel` | UI | | `Dashboard` | `SimulationMapContent` | UI | | `SimulationService` | (keep, or `PlaybackService`) | Infra | | `analytics` package | `events` package | Infra | | `*Singleton` objects | `AppGraph` (DI) | Infra | | `SimpleSimulationConfigurationManager` | `InMemoryConfigurationStore` | Infra | | `SimulationEvent.SimulationStarted` | `SimulationEvent.Started` | Domain | | (etc. for all event types) | (remove `Simulation` prefix) | Domain |
---
**Dead Code (delete, don't rename):** - `PauseController` / `SimplePauseController` вҶҗ verify unused, then delete - `PlayResumeButtonState` вҶҗ if unreferenced, delete - `SimulationConfigurationExt.kt` (both; consolidate) вҶҗ merge duplicates - `utils.kt` (all three) вҶҗ split by purpose, names like `LocationMappers.kt`
